title: Terms & Conditions | PoliceStationRepUK — Find Accredited Police Station Reps

headings.text: Need a Police Station Rep in Kent?

content: HomeTerms & ConditionsTerms & ConditionsLast updated: 4 January 2026Directory Status and No IntermediationPoliceStationRepUK.com does not act as an agent, introducer, or intermediary for legal services.Listings are provided for information only. Any engagement between a police station representative and a law firm or organisation is a matter solely between those parties.This website:Does not provide legal adviceDoes not offer regulated legal servicesIs not authorised or regulated by the Solicitors Regulation AuthorityDoes not arrange, mediate, or facilitate the provision of legal servicesDoes not guarantee the availability, quality, or conduct of listed representativesAll legal services are provided by the independent professionals and organisations listed on this site, each of whom is responsible for their own regulatory compliance, professional indemnity insurance, and standards of service.Website OperatorOperated by: Defence Legal Services LtdContact: robertcashman@defencelegalservices.co.ukPhone: 07535 494446Service DescriptionPoliceStationRepUK is a free directory platform connecting criminal defence solicitors with police station representatives.We provide:A searchable database of registered representativesPolice station contact informationLegal resources and guidesOptional featured/premium placement for representatives (paid service)Verification & Accuracy NoticeImportant — Please Read:We confirm information provided by representatives at the point of registration, such as contact details and stated accreditation.We do not independently audit:Ongoing availability or workloadProfessional indemnity insurance statusPerformance, conduct, or quality of serviceOngoing accreditation status with regulatory bodiesListings are not endorsements.Solicitor firms must conduct their own due diligence before instructing any representative, including verification of current accreditation status, insurance, and suitability for the specific case.User ResponsibilitiesFor Representatives:You must be fully accredited (PSRAS or duty solicitor qualified)All information you provide must be accurate and currentYou must update your profile if your details changeYou are responsible for maintaining valid insurance and accreditationMisrepresentation of qualifications is a criminal offenceFor Solicitor Firms:You must verify accreditation and insurance before instructing any representativeYou are responsible for client care and conduct of casesThe directory is a finding tool only — we do not recommend specific repsLimitation of LiabilityPoliceStationRepUK (Defence Legal Services Ltd) is not responsible for:The conduct, performance, or quality of service provided by representativesInaccurate or outdated information provided by representativesDisputes between solicitors and representativesProfessional negligence by representativesLosses arising from use of the directoryWe provide the directory "as is" without warranty of any kind.Featured ListingsFeatured/premium placements are paid promotional listings.Featured representatives pay for priority placement in search results and homepage visibility. Featured status does not indicate endorsement, quality rating, or recommendation by PoliceStationRepUK.All featured listings are clearly labelled as "Featured" or "Advertisement".Reporting InaccuraciesIf you find inaccurate information in a representative's profile:Email robertcashman@defencelegalservices.co.ukUse the "Suggest Edit" feature on station pagesCall 07535 494446We will review reported inaccuracies within 7 working days and take appropriate action, which may include contacting the representative for clarification or removing the listing.Questions About These Terms?Contact Defence Legal Services LtdEmail Us
